message:
refactor(executor): add hasTypedTable() helper and more comptime dispatch

- Add hasTypedTable() inline fn using comptime field iteration
- Use hasTypedTable() in execute() and SELECT * handling
- Convert preloadColumns and readColumnAtIndices dispatch to comptime
